_publications._publicationTitle: C-Fiber Loss as a Possible Cause of Neuropathic Pain in Schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: In fact, 16 of 20 patients showed normal electrophysiological parameters. Only in four patients could signs of focal or multifocal sensomotoric axonal neuropathy could be detected.
details: Standard electrophysiological measurements showed normal parameters in 16 of 20 patients. Only four patients showed signs of focal or multifocal sensomotoric axonal neuropathy.
